mandate: Audits for platform-agnostic host behavior and correct abstraction layers in remoting/host/.

checklist.multi_session_handling: Understand that ChromotingHost supports multiple unauthenticated sessions and concurrent authenticated sessions with different client IDs.
checklist.session_policies_validation: Verify that session policies are correctly validated using SessionPoliciesValidator.
checklist.mojo_services_platform: Be aware that ChromotingHostServices is implemented differently across platforms (Mac/Linux vs Windows).
checklist.mojo_capturer_cleanup: Ensure `MojoVideoCapturerList` automatically deletes capturers on disconnect to prevent resource leaks.
